bird.name: 棕颈犀鸟
bird.summary: 棕颈犀鸟（學名：Aceros nipalensis），也稱作棕颈無盔犀鸟，是犀鸟科无盔犀鸟属的唯一一种，在IUCN紅色名錄中列為易危物種，也是中國國家二級保護動物。 描述 全長約120cm，兩性均有巨大而有力的象牙白色的嘴，嘴上無盔突，上嘴基部有黑白相間的帶斑，雙眼周圍和頰部則…

locations.name: Pakke Tiger Reserve
locations.summary: Pakke Tiger Reserve is a Project Tiger reserve in the East Kameng district of Arunachal Pradesh in Northeast India.

locations.name: 温带阔叶混交林
locations.summary: 温带阔叶混交林是一种温带陆地生物群系，位于阔叶树生态区，和针叶树与阔叶树的针叶混交林生态区。 “温带阔叶混交林”这一术语，由世界自然基金会（WWF）使用，在全球生物地理学中，作为组织生态区的生物群落之一。

relations.subject: 棕颈犀鸟
relations.evidence: |name-list-style=amp |year=2006 |title=A record of the Rufous-necked Hornbill Aceros nipalensis from West Bengal, India |journal=Indian Birds |volume=2 |issue=2 |pages=37–38 |url=http://indianbirds.in/pdfs/IB2.2_GhoseETAL_RNHornbill.pdf}} and Pakke Tiger Reserve. It predominantly inhabits ridged and hilly forests, primarily temperate broadleaf and mixed forests at elevations of , It has also been recorded in dry woodland

relations.subject: 棕颈犀鸟
relations.evidence: It is locally extinct in Nepal due to hunting and significant loss of habitat. There are less than 10,000 adults left in the wild. With a length of about , it is among the largest Bucerotine hornbills
relations.object_summary: 直接猎捕或误捕造成额外死亡。
